product_basic_kyc.product_name: Nikitavibhor Natural Diamond Pendant Set with Emerald Accents
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Indian women aged 25-45 seeking elegant and traditional fine jewelry
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Enhancing ethnic and formal wear for weddings, festivals, and special occasions
secondary_use_cases: Gifting for anniversaries, engagements, and festive celebrations
Daily office wear for women who prefer elegant yet subtle jewelry
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Perfect for Indian festivals like Diwali, Karva Chauth, weddings, and family celebrations

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: The pendant set complements traditional Indian attire such as sarees, lehengas, and salwar kameez, widely worn during cultural celebrations and ceremonies.
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Worn at home, family gatherings, office parties, and during festive outings to showcase refined taste and cultural elegance.
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Classic yet contemporary Indian jewelry that blends heritage with modern style for daily and celebratory use.
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Symbolizes status, beauty and tradition; evokes pride and confidence among Indian women while being a versatile daily and festive accessory.

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Nikitavibhor Natural Diamond Pendant Set with Emerald Accent – Elegant Indian Jewellery for Women
bullet_points: Exquisite craftsmanship featuring natural diamonds and vibrant emerald stones for a luxurious look
Perfectly sized pendant and matching earrings for versatile use on festive occasions and daily wear
Hypoallergenic and skin-friendly materials suitable for Indian skin tones and sensitivities
Ideal gift choice for weddings, anniversaries, and traditional festivals like Diwali and Karva Chauth
Lightweight design ensures comfort for extended wear during long events and celebrations
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Nikitavibhor presents a stunning natural diamond pendant set accented with green emeralds, crafted to enhance traditional Indian outfits. This elegant jewelry set offers timeless beauty and comfort, perfect for festive occasions and gifting.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Detailed close-up shots highlighting diamond and emerald quality and setting
Lifestyle images featuring the set paired with sarees and ethnic wear at Indian festivals
Craftsmanship story explaining the design inspiration and materials used
Comparison charts showing versatility for both festive and office wear
Customer testimonials emphasizing gifting and daily use satisfaction

Stress versatility for both festive and daily graceful wear
Tell story of artisanal craftsmanship rooted in Indian heritage

Focus on gifting moments and emotional connections

Position as meaningful gift reflecting Indian cultural values
Appeal to millennial and working women balancing tradition and style
Create aspirational yet accessible luxury lifestyle imagery
trust_premium_perception: Highlight brand authenticity and Indian craftsmanship
Use clear certification references for natural stones
Showcase fine detailing, quality materials in clear images

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Product design, shape, and color must remain exactly same; gold chains, emerald stones, diamond arrangement, and overall structure must not be altered.
recommended_image_angles: Front-facing pendant with earrings full set view
Close-up macro shots of diamond and emerald stones
Side angle showing chain thickness and pendant depth
Ear view close-up with earring detailing
Scale comparison placement with hand or ethnic apparel
recommended_real_life_environments: Elegant indoor setting with saree or ethnic outfit draping
Festive celebration background with subtle diyas or lights
Office or formal meeting room environment
Gift box presentation with welcoming Indian decor
indian_lifestyle_settings: Office party with ethnic dress code
Traditional wedding guest or close family event
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Professional lighting minimizing glare; emphasis on natural sparkle and true color of diamonds and emeralds; balanced soft light to highlight texture and fine details realistically.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean white and velvet backgrounds with gold and green accent overlays; minimalistic layout ensuring product prominence with text sections for features and emotional value.

suitable_backgrounds: Warm terracotta or beige for ethnic warmth
Clean white for clarity and standard Amazon compliance
Subtle gold gradient to reflect premium quality
lifestyle_scenarios: Woman wearing pendant set with saree at festival
Close-up of pendant resting on embroidered blouse
Model at wedding ceremony wearing matching set
Office desk with pendant set beside work essentials
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Space at top or bottom edges with subtle overlay; avoid covering pendant or earrings; ensure text contrast on dark or light backgrounds.
what_must_be_avoided: Excessive artificial sparkle or unrealistic reflections
Backgrounds that clash with emerald green or gold tones
Overly dark or shadowy images hiding product details
Misrepresentation of product color, size, or shape
